title: Mekanism Turrets
description: Defend your factory from hostile mobs AND players!
body:
A Turret mod for Mekanism on NeoForge.

📖 What does this mod do?

In the dark of night, in a field of monsters... It is you vs the world.
Or... It was, until you crafted your robotic companion, the Ultimate Laser Turret.

Turn it on, set targets, and watch as mortal scum falls before you! Just don't forget the Speed or Energy Upgrades!

✅ Features:
- Turrets to conquer the land!
- Electric Fences to stop the tough ones!

Need help? Come check out my Discord server.

📖 Compatibility
- Mekanism (Obviously right?)
- GeckoLib (Needed for Turrets to move)
- Jade (Optional to see power supply in fences)

Discord:

https://discord.com/invite/wuqqZbDdkh

Github:

https://github.com/x3rdev/MekanismTurrets/issues
